[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-policies" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Policies

Policies & Requirements

To begin your Studio Channel project, please review the following policies. Understanding these ensures a smooth, on-schedule build from start to launch.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Signed Agreement Required

A signed agreement is required before project commencement. This protects both you and our team and ensures all terms are clearly understood before work begins.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Payment via PayPal Only

Payment is accepted via PayPal only. A 50% non-refundable deposit is required to begin work. The remaining balance is paid in two installments: 25% mid-project and 25% prior to launch.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Materials Submitted Before Work Begins

All required content, assets, and materials must be submitted before your project can begin. Delays in submission may impact your project timeline.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Client Responsibility for Accuracy

Clients are responsible for providing accurate and complete materials, including text, images, video links, and branding elements.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Revisions Are Package-Based

Revisions are limited to the terms of the selected package. Additional revisions beyond what is included may require an additional fee.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Consulting Calls on Desktop Only

Consulting calls must be attended on a desktop or laptop using a web browser. Mobile devices and tablets are not supported for screen sharing sessions.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card msc-policy-highlight" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

72-Hour Response Window

All communication and approvals must be completed within 72 hours to keep the project on schedule. Delays in response may result in adjustments to the project timeline.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
